sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79538" key="parhgorhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρηγορ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n79538.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παρηγορικός</ref></xr>, Sch.ll.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.726</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
